hypothesis: In LPTEM of monodisperse 20 nm spherical Au nanoparticles in water with liquid thicknesses of 50–150 nm, a real-time PI controller that modulates electron beam dose rate using SAM-EM’s on-the-fly MSD slope estimates will maintain the effective 2D diffusion coefficient within ±10% of a preset target for at least 90% of frames, whereas open-loop operation will exhibit deviations exceeding 25%.
